name: GH_FileWatcher
summary: Provides easy mechanisms to monitor changes to the local File System.

methods.name: CreateDirectoryWatcher(String, String, GH_FileWatcherEvents, GH_FileWatcher.FileChanged)
methods.signature: public static GH_FileWatcher CreateDirectoryWatcher(string folderPath, string filter, GH_FileWatcherEvents events, GH_FileWatcher.FileChanged delegate)
methods.summary: Create a new FileSystem Watcher object aimed at a specific file.

returns.doc: A new filewatcher aimed at the specified folder.

methods.name: CreateDirectoryWatcher(String, String, GH_FileWatcherEvents, GH_FileWatcher.FileChangedSimple)
methods.signature: public static GH_FileWatcher CreateDirectoryWatcher(string folderPath, string filter, GH_FileWatcherEvents events, GH_FileWatcher.FileChangedSimple delegate)
methods.summary: Create a new FileSystem Watcher object aimed at a specific file.

returns.doc: A new filewatcher aimed at the specified folder.

methods.name: CreateFileWatcher(String, GH_FileWatcherEvents, GH_FileWatcher.FileChanged)
methods.signature: public static GH_FileWatcher CreateFileWatcher(string filePath, GH_FileWatcherEvents events, GH_FileWatcher.FileChanged delegate)
methods.summary: Create a new FileSystem Watcher object aimed at a specific file.

returns.doc: A new filewatcher aimed at the specified file.

methods.name: CreateFileWatcher(String, GH_FileWatcherEvents, GH_FileWatcher.FileChangedSimple)
methods.signature: public static GH_FileWatcher CreateFileWatcher(string filePath, GH_FileWatcherEvents events, GH_FileWatcher.FileChangedSimple delegate)
methods.summary: Create a new FileSystem Watcher object aimed at a specific file.

returns.doc: A new filewatcher aimed at the specified file.

methods.name: Dispose()
methods.summary: Releases all resources used by the GH_FileWatcher

methods.name: Dispose(Boolean)
methods.summary: Releases the unmanaged resources used by the GH_FileWatcher and optionally releases the managed resources

params.name: disposing
params.doc: True to release both managed and unmanaged resources; false to release only unmanaged resources

methods.name: SetCustomUIThread(Control)
methods.summary: If you want to override the default Invoke behaviour, you must set InvokeOnDefaultThread to False and supply either a custom Control or a Form.

params.name: target
params.doc: GUI target object which will be used for Invoking File System Events.

methods.name: SetCustomUIThread(Form)
methods.summary: If you want to override the default Invoke behaviour, you must set InvokeOnDefaultThread to False and supply either a custom Control or a Form.

params.name: target
params.doc: GUI target object which will be used for Invoking File System Events.

properties.name: Active
properties.summary: Gets or sets the active flag on this watcher.

properties.name: Buffer
properties.summary: Gets or sets the time during which events are buffered. If multiple events for the same file occur within the buffered timespan, they will be merged into one event.

properties.name: InvokeOnDefaultThread
properties.summary: Gets or sets invoke behaviour for events. If true, then the event delegate is called via the Grasshopper main UI thread. This is almost always what you need.

properties.name: Path
properties.summary: Gets the file or folder path currently being watched.
